A2aAuthType.description: How the gateway authenticates to an upstream A2A agent.

oneOf.description: No authentication; the agent is reached as-is.
oneOf.title: No authentication

oneOf.description: Bearer token authentication. The token is supplied in `secret` and sent as `Authorization: Bearer <secret>`.
oneOf.title: Bearer token

oneOf.description: API key authentication. The key is supplied in `secret` and sent as an `x-api-key: <secret>` header on every upstream request.
oneOf.title: API key

oneOf.description: OAuth 2.0 client credentials grant. Accepted on the resource for forward compatibility, but the runtime does not yet mint tokens for upstream A2A agents.
oneOf.title: OAuth 2.0 client credentials

A2aProtocolVersion.description: The A2A wire-format version pinned for an upstream agent.

oneOf.description: A2A 1.0 wire format with protobuf-JSON envelopes and PascalCase methods.
oneOf.title: A2A 1.0

oneOf.description: A2A 0.3 wire format with `kind`-discriminated JSON-RPC objects.
oneOf.title: A2A 0.3

auth_type.description: How the gateway authenticates to the upstream agent. The credential is held by the gateway and is never forwarded from or exposed to the calling client.

client_id.description: OAuth client identifier used for the OAuth 2.0 client credentials grant. Required when `auth_type` is `oauth2`; ignored otherwise.

display_name.description: Operator-facing label, unique within the gateway. It is the path segment under which the agent is exposed to callers as `/a2a/<display_name>`, so it must be a single non-empty URL path segment.

enabled.description: Whether this agent is active. When `false`, it is not served and cannot be reached.

protocol_version.description: The A2A wire-format version AISIX uses for this agent. AISIX pins the version explicitly so the served agent card and accepted requests stay consistent.

scopes.description: OAuth scopes to request. Joined with spaces into the `scope` parameter of the token request. Only used when `auth_type` is `oauth2`.

secret.description: Credential AISIX uses to authenticate to the upstream agent. For `bearer`, AISIX sends it as `Authorization: Bearer <secret>`; for `api_key`, AISIX sends it as `x-api-key: <secret>`; for `oauth2`, it is the client secret. Leave unset for `none`.

timeout_ms.description: Maximum time, in milliseconds, to wait for a single upstream operation, including fetching the agent card or invoking the agent. Must be at least `1` when set. When omitted, AISIX applies a built-in default.

token_url.description: OAuth token endpoint URL where the gateway exchanges the client credentials for an access token, such as `https://auth.example.com/oauth/token`. Required when `auth_type` is `oauth2`; ignored otherwise.

url.description: The upstream agent's base URL, such as `https://agents.example.com/a2a`. AISIX reaches this URL over HTTP with the A2A JSON-RPC 2.0 protocol and discovers the agent card relative to it.
